calendar.matters:
Quiet Title
Off Calendar Mar-09-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Quiet Title hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Deborah Neville.
David Serrano Sewell, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, for Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco.
Pat Peterson, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, present in court with no opposition.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants: All Persons Claiming Any Interest In or Lien Upon, The Real Property. The City's title to the Property as of June 27, 2003 is establised and quieted, see details in scanned 6 pg. Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
